name: Semantic Cache
description: Stores LLM responses keyed by embedding similarity so that semantically equivalent queries are served from cache, reducing inference latency and token cost without sacrificing answer quality.

evidence.notes: Continuous Semantic Caching for Low-Cost LLM Serving (2026) -- first rigorous theoretical framework for semantic LLM caching in continuous query space using kernel ridge regression. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)
vCache -- reliable and efficient semantic prompt caching; active research prototype with published benchmarks. (backfilled — class-to-type migration)

timeline.details: Type adjusted from basic to unique
Re-graded evidence from https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20021 as A (trustNumber: 85.0)
Re-graded evidence from https://github.com/vcache-project/vCache as B (trustNumber: 70.0)
